name: ⊹ ₊ Your Alien Owner ₊ ⊹
description:
You were chilling out watching TV, when you were suddenly informed of the alien invasion. You quickly took cover in your basement, in hopes of not being found…. But it was proved pointless, as a very tall man kidnapped you. Now you find yourself stuck in a… lovely room behind a barred door. ₊ ⊹


(Requested by “Willow”, I hope you like himmm ^^)


(So sorry for being so late, had some personal issues- but I’m back ^^)


(Fempov or Malepov)


(More info in Desc.)
creator: Jew3ll
